title: Unique Jumbo Shrinkwrap Cello Bag
features: ELEGANT GIFT PRESENTATION – Perfect for wrapping gift baskets, these oversized cellophane bags offer a polished and professional look for your thoughtful gifts.
EASY TO USE – Simply place your basket in the bag, close the open end, and use a hair dryer to shrink and seal for a sleek finish. Ideal for a secure, spill-proof presentation.
VERSATILE FOR ALL OCCASIONS – Perfect for baby showers, weddings, birthdays, fundraisers, and any event where you want to present a beautifully wrapped gift basket.
ADJUSTABLE SIZE – Fits a variety of basket sizes, making it easy to create personalized, vibrant gift displays by adding colorful fillers and ribbons.
DIMENSIONS & DETAILS – Bag dimensions: 10.79" (H) x 6.6" (W) x 0.05" (D); weight: 2 grams. Made in China for quality assurance.
description: Create a polished, professional presentation for your gift baskets with the Unique Jumbo Shrinkwrap Cello Bag! This oversized cellophane bag is the perfect solution for wrapping your large gift baskets, ensuring the contents stay securely in place while adding a touch of elegance. Key Features: DIMENSIONS – Measures 10.79" (H) x 6.6" (W) x 0.05" (D) for large gift baskets or gifts. EASY TO USE – Simply place the basket in the bag, close the open end, and seal with heat using a hair dryer. VERSATILE USE – Ideal for gift baskets, baby showers, weddings, birthday parties, or fundraisers. POLISHED FINISH – Provides a sleek, professional look for your gift presentation. ADDITIONAL CUSTOMIZATION – Add a bow or colorful fillers to give your wrapped basket a personalized pop. WEIGHT – Lightweight at 2 grams for easy handling and transport. Perfect for creating a memorable gift presentation at your next celebration or event, the Unique Jumbo Shrinkwrap Cello Bag adds the final touch to your beautiful gift basket creations!
